desc: Tigerstar unleashes a dog pack on ThunderClan — and Bluestar makes the ultimate sacrifice. ⚠️
descZh: 虎星放出狗群扑向雷族——而蓝星做出了最崇高的牺牲。

q.en: What does Tigerstar use to try to destroy ThunderClan?
q.zh: 虎星利用什么来试图摧毁雷族？

explain.en: Tigerstar lures a pack of dogs into ThunderClan's territory with a trail of prey, planning to wipe out the Clan.
explain.zh: 虎星用一串猎物把狗群引向雷族领地，企图灭掉整个族群。

q.en: How does Bluestar save her Clan from the dogs?
q.zh: 蓝星是如何从狗群手中拯救族群的？

options.en: She traps them in a cave
She fights them all alone and wins according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她独自战胜了所有狗（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She leads the dogs over the cliff into the gorge, sacrificing herself
options.zh: 她把狗群引下悬崖坠入峡谷，牺牲了自己

explain.en: Bluestar leads the dog pack over the edge of the gorge, dying to save ThunderClan.
explain.zh: 蓝星把狗群引下峡谷悬崖，为拯救雷族而牺牲。

q.en: What new rank does Fireheart receive after Bluestar's death?
q.zh: 蓝星死后，火星获得了什么新职位？

options.en: Warrior according to some versions of the story
options.zh: Warrior（武士）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Fireheart becomes Firestar, the new leader of ThunderClan.
explain.zh: Fireheart 成为雷族新任族长——火星（Firestar）。

q.en: Who becomes Firestar's mate / close partner?
q.zh: 谁成了 Firestar 的伴侣／亲密伙伴？

explain.en: Sandstorm stands beside Firestar and becomes his mate after he takes leadership.
explain.zh: 在火星成为族长后，沙暴一直陪伴在他身边，成为他的伴侣。

q.en: What does Firestar receive as the new leader of ThunderClan?
q.zh: 作为雷族新族长，Firestar 获得了什么？

options.en: Nine lives and a new name from StarClan
options.zh: 来自星族的九条命和新名字

options.en: A tail of nine tails according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 九条尾巴（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Like all leaders, Firestar receives nine lives and his leader name from StarClan.
explain.zh: 和所有族长一样，火星从星族那里获得了九条命和族长之名。

q.en: Where does Tigerstar set his deadly trap for the Clan and the dogs?
q.zh: 虎星把致命陷阱设在了哪里（对付族群和狗）？

options.en: In Twolegplace according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 在两脚兽地盘（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Tigerstar leads the dogs to a gorge that ends in a cliff, intending to wipe out ThunderClan — but Bluestar turns the trap on the dogs.
explain.zh: 虎星把狗群引到尽头是悬崖的峡谷，想灭掉雷族——但蓝星将这陷阱反作用于狗群。

q.en: Who leads RiverClan at this time?

options.en: Crookedstar according to some versions of the story
options.zh: Crookedstar（曲星）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Crookedstar has died (in the flood of the previous book), so Leopardstar now leads RiverClan.
explain.zh: 曲星已死（死于上一本的洪水），此时由豹星统领河族。

q.en: How does Tigerstar escape after the dog plan fails?
q.zh: 狗群计划失败后，虎星如何脱身？

options.en: He flees to gather more cats (BloodClan) for a bigger war
options.zh: 他逃走，去纠集更多猫（血族）准备更大的战争

options.en: He becomes a kittypet according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他成了宠物猫（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Tigerstar survives and later forms 'TigerClan' with BloodClan, setting up the final battle in book 6.
explain.zh: 虎星活了下来，后来联合血族组成“虎族”，为第六本的决战埋下伏笔。

q.en: What emotion drives Bluestar's dangerous choices in this book?
q.zh: 是什么情绪驱使蓝星在本书中做出危险的抉择？

options.en: Paranoia that StarClan and her Clan betrayed her
options.zh: 她认定星族和族群背叛了自己的偏执

options.en: Love for Tigerstar according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 对虎星的爱（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Bluestar's growing belief that everyone has betrayed her leads her to make reckless, dangerous decisions.
explain.zh: 蓝星越来越坚信所有人都背叛了她，这让她做出了鲁莽而危险的决断。

q.en: What title does Fireheart take when he becomes leader?
q.zh: 火星成为族长时，采用了什么名号？

explain.en: As leader he takes the name Firestar, keeping the 'fire' of the prophecy that began his journey.
explain.zh: 成为族长后他取名 Firestar，延续了开启他旅程的那道“火”的预言。
